name: search
description: High-accuracy web search via Parallel.ai API. Optimized for AI agents with rich excerpts and citations. Use this for deep research, company/person research, fact-checking, and complex queries requiring multi-hop reasoning.

objective.description: Search query/objective (e.g., 'Who is the CEO of Anthropic?', 'latest AI news')

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return

mode.description: Search mode: 'one-shot' for simple queries, 'agentic' for complex research
